{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/223446723?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/G0odUser/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/G0odUser/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/G0odUser/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/G0odUser/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/G0odUser", "id": 223446723, "login": "G0odUser", "node_id": "U_kgDODVGGww", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/G0odUser/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/G0odUser/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/G0odUser/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/G0odUser/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/G0odUser/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/G0odUser", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42437", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "## Summary

Voice-call realtime WebSocket accepted oversized frames.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `>= 2026.4.9 < 2026.4.10`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.10`

## Impact

The voice-call realtime WebSocket path could accept oversized frames, creating a remote availability risk for deployments exposing that webhook path.

## Technical Details

The fix rejects oversized realtime WebSocket frames before processing them.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #63890. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.10`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `afadb7dae6738819ad9c7d2597ace0516957d20e`
- PR: #63890

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.10 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Reporters

Thanks to G0odUser from ADLab of VenusTech
Thanks to @zsxsoft, with sponsorship from @KeenSecurityLab and @qclawer for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00417, "percentile": 0.33542}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vw3h-q6xq-jjm5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T21:48:36Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vw3h-q6xq-jjm5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vw3h-q6xq-jjm5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42437"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-05T12:16:18Z", "published_at": "2026-04-17T21:48:36Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-vw3h-q6xq-jjm5", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/63890", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/afadb7dae6738819ad9c7d2597ace0516957d20e", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42437", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-denial-of-service-via-oversized-websocket-frames-in-voice-call-realtime-path", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vw3h-q6xq-jjm5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-vw3h-q6xq-jjm5", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Voice-call realtime WebSocket accepted oversized frames", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:25:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vw3h-q6xq-jjm5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2026.4.9, < 2026.4.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Voice-call realtime WebSocket accepted oversized frames
